title: Add gateway /status CBOR power-field tests
description: Why this exists: t2hn.6.1 adds native gateway /status CBOR power-provider and valid-only power fields, but current tests cover HAL, app-interface, and Meshtastic paths rather than decoding the gateway /status CBOR surface. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware test harness or refactorable encoder test that asserts map count, buffer bound, provider availability keys, and optional battery/voltage/charging/external_power fields for absent and fully populated snapshots. Acceptance criteria: native_sim test decodes /status CBOR and fails if unknown telemetry is fabricated or if max optional fields exceed the fixed buffer.
